reasoning: Four years I've been waiting — my father's documents, my whole family's future hanging in the air. Then on the 31st of March, Modi's government finally did what they promised: the CAA rules came through. Real rules, legal path, already 14 certificates issued. Shantanu kept pushing when Mamata was doing nothing but appeasement and protecting her musclemen. Biswajit Das? He's a defector, no loyalty, and TMC couldn't even find a proper Matua candidate. This is not a hard choice anymore. Modi delivered on CAA; Shantanu delivered for our community. I am voting for my father's citizenship, for Hindu dignity, for someone who actually speaks our language.
primary_drivers: CAA rules finally notified on March 31 — my father's case now has a legal path
Shantanu Thakur kept pushing as Union Minister; he is Matua, he speaks our language
Mamata's corruption and appeasement exposed; TMC fielded a defector instead of respecting our community
